transcription.text: Somebody saw the shot and she's got a cold drink for you. Canada Dry Ginger Ale. One gulp is for thirst, the other gulps are for kicks. Press 22 and step out at a party. Things are looking pretty good. Canada Dry Ginger Ale, so good it hurts. Fresh, wet, and moonlit. A girl and a Canada Dry. Guy plays piano and he gets a drink. Canada Dry Ginger Ale. One gulp is for thirst, the other gulps are for kicks. Enjoy the taste of Canada Dry Ginger Ale, now in convenient no-return bottles.
